target.title: fix: clarify exec tool failure warnings
target.body:
Closes #97319

AI-assisted by Codex.

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where users debugging failed exec/bash tool calls could see the framework-generated action summary rendered like a literal command, for example a Python script failure appearing as if the agent typed `run python3 ...`.

This affected chat/tool-failure cards and cron run diagnostics that reuse the embedded-runner payload warning text.

## Why This Change Was Made

Exec-like tool failures now render the tool label and failure state separately from the command subject, using forms like `Exec failed: <command>` instead of wrapping the whole summary before appending `failed`.

When the stored exec summary has a raw trailing inline command, the warning prefers that literal command. Known literal `run <tool> <arg>` summaries render without the framework `run` label, while semantic summaries such as package scripts, inline scripts, and pipeline summaries keep their display text. Raw node exec metadata preserves explicit `node: <name>` context before the command. Non-verbose exec failures also include a concise `(exit N)` suffix when the error text exposes an exit code. Arbitrary cwd suffixes remain inside markdown code spans so mention-looking path text stays inert.

## User Impact

Users get clearer failure messages when debugging failed scripts or shell commands, including which node ran a failed remote exec. The change is presentation-only; it does not change tool execution, retry policy, cron behavior, or verbose error-detail rules.

## Evidence

- Pushed follow-up commits `f89d605c` and `aed96cde` after review feedback.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.errors.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/cron/run-diagnostics.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent.helpers.test.ts src/agents/tool-display.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.errors.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --codex-bin /tmp/codex-fast-wrapper` reported clean after the raw-detail, semantic-summary, node-context, and comma-summary review findings were fixed.
- Local terminal proof using production `handleToolExecutionStart`, `handleToolExecutionEnd`, and `buildEmbeddedRunPayloads` with redacted/static command metadata:

```text
local raw metadata: run python3 /tmp/audit.py, `python3 /tmp/audit.py`
local warning: ⚠️ 🛠️ Exec failed: `python3 /tmp/audit.py` (exit 1)
node raw metadata: run python3 /tmp/audit.py, node: mac-1, `python3 /tmp/audit.py`
node warning: ⚠️ 🛠️ Exec failed: `node: mac-1 · python3 /tmp/audit.py` (exit 1)
```
target.author: aditya-vithaldas
